news.headline: CIM Group secures $57.5M loan for 533,000 sqft Houston industrial property portfolio from Creation Equity and PGIM Real Estate.
news.summary: CIM Group has successfully secured a loan of $57.5 million for a Houston industrial property portfolio spanning across 533,000 square feet.

news.headline: Brookfield aiming to raise $7B for infrastructure fund.
Floodbase secures $5M investment from EIF to boost growth as the top platform for insuring flood risk.
news.summary: In Brooklyn, New York on February 24th, 2025, Floodbase revealed a significant development with a $5 million investment. The prominent Ecosystem Integrity Fund (EIF) led this investment, joined by the Pulse Fund. This substantial financial support aims to propel Floodbase in addressing uninsured flood risk more efficiently.

news.headline: WSWA's SipSource Q4 2024 forecast shows 94% accuracy, validating its predictive power in wine & spirits industry.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, the Wine & Spirits Wholesalers of America's SipSource forecasting report once again proved its exceptional reliability. The 2024 predictions were 94% accurate for the main All Core Spirits forecast (excluding RTDs), showcasing its unmatched precision in the industry. This demonstrates the high level of trust and credibility in the accuracy of the report among industry professionals.

news.headline: LiveOak Fiber appoints Shane Schilling as new CEO. Schilling joined LiveOak in 2023.
news.summary: LiveOak Fiber, based in Brunswick, Georgia, has recently appointed Shane Schilling as its new CEO. Schilling, who has been with the company since 2023, will assume the role immediately. This move comes as a significant development for LiveOak Fiber and marks a new chapter in its leadership.

news.headline: EC Pres. von der Leyen: Ukraine could join the EU before 2030 if they continue at the current speed and quality.
Intel's stock has surged without a CEO.
The Snow League reveals Season One global schedule with 36 athletes starting in Aspen, Colorado, March 7-8, 2025.
news.summary: The Snow League, founded in June 2024 by three-time Olympic gold medalist Shaun White, has revealed the entire Season One schedule for its inaugural competition dedicated to snowboarding and freeskiing. The global league kicks off with the season-opener in Aspen, Colorado on March 7–8, 2025. This event at the iconic resort will feature 36 of the world's best athletes, with competitions scheduled to take place at various renowned resorts across three continents. The league aims to bring a new level of excitement to competitive winter sports.

news.headline: UMass Chan Medical School partners with Curai Health for virtual care in NIH-funded COVID-19 study.
news.summary: Research is being conducted to analyze the effectiveness of at-home COVID-19 testing. In Washington on February 24, 2025, the partnership between UMass Chan Medical School and Curai Health was announced. The collaboration aims to offer virtual healthcare services to individuals partaking in a study exploring the utilization and success rate of at-home antigen and molecular tests in combating the virus.

news.headline: Texas students using ST Math show consistent academic growth for 4 years, despite statewide decline in STAAR Math scores.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 24, 2025, MIND Education, based in Irvine, California, reported that despite a decrease in statewide STAAR Math scores, students using the ST Math program have continued to demonstrate steady academic progress for the fourth consecutive year. This positive trend is particularly noteworthy given the challenging educational landscape. The data reveals a consistent pattern of improvement, indicating the effectiveness of MIND Education's neuroscience-based math curriculum. The specific numbers were not disclosed, but this achievement underscores the program's success in fostering student learning and development.

news.headline: RH Peterson Co. unveils their 1,800-watt Fire Magic Built-in Outdoor Induction Cooktop for luxury outdoor kitchens, offers precise temp control from 150-450 °F.
news.summary: In City of Industry, California, Fire Magic® has introduced its initial outdoor induction cooktop product designed for upscale outdoor kitchens. This innovative Fire Magic cooktop operates at 1,800 watts, making it the premier outdoor induction cooktop option. It offers rapid heating, energy efficiency, and accurate temperature management ranging from 150 to 450 °F, adjustable in 10°F intervals. This launch signifies the brand's move towards expanding its range of luxury grills, accessories, and storage solutions for outdoor culinary spaces.

news.headline: HAC, Inc. is adding Local Express platform to 36 Homeland and 11 United stores for online prepared food options.
news.summary: A California-based company, HAC, Inc., which manages a total of 74 supermarkets in Oklahoma, has decided to implement the Made-to-Order omnichannel solution provided by Local Express. This technology will be deployed across 36 Homeland and 11 United stores operated by HAC, Inc.

news.headline: DAWN requests ICC to investigate Biden admin for aiding Israeli crimes in Gaza. Communication made on Jan 19, 2025.
news.summary: A request was submitted to the International Criminal Court (ICC) on January 19, 2025, urging an investigation into former U.S. officials President Joe Biden, Secretary of State Anthony Blinken, and Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin for their alleged involvement in aiding and abetting Israeli war crimes and crimes against humanity in Gaza. The submission, consisting of a 172-page document by DAWN, called for a probe into their roles in these acts. The communication was made to ICC Prosecutor Karim Khan, with the backing of ICC-registered legal experts.

news.headline: Artificial Limbs and Joints market set to hit USD 4.5 billion by 2031 due to tech advancements and rising demand for prosthetics.
news.summary: The Artificial Limbs and Joints Market is experiencing significant growth due to advancements in prosthetic technology, a rise in cases of limb loss from accidents and chronic diseases, and an increasing demand for high-performance, custom-fit prosthetics. The market is being driven by innovations like bionic limbs and AI-powered solutions. With a surge in demand, the market is expected to reach a value of X billion dollars by the end of the forecast period, showing a Y% increase from the previous year. This growth trajectory is anticipated to continue owing to the evolving technologies and rising awareness about the benefits of advanced prosthetics.

The new flavor is exclusively available at Vitamin Shoppes nationwide, offering customers a unique way to enjoy their protein intake. It is a celebration of taste and fitness goals, making it an appealing option for those looking to switch up their protein routine.

news.headline: Riot Platforms to report Q4 earnings with $134.78 million revenue expectation, stock down 39.78% past year.
news.summary: Riot Platforms Inc (NASDAQ:RIOT) is set to announce its Q4 earnings after market hours on Monday. Analysts are expecting an EPS of 11 cents and revenues of $134.78 million. The stock has experienced a 39.78% decline in the past year but has seen a 25.12% increase in the last six months.Facing bearish pressure, investors are interested in how the stock aligns with Wall Street estimates. For more details on the performance of Riot stock and a historical comparison, visit a financial news website.

news.headline: 3Z Pharmaceuticals released study on shared metabolic pathways in ADHD therapeutics, published in The Journal of Pharmacology and Experimental Therapeutics.
news.summary: In Reykjavik, Iceland on February 24, 2025, 3Z Pharmaceuticals, known for their focus on developing therapies for central nervous system disorders, shared details about a significant study. The findings were disclosed in The Journal of Pharmacology and Experimental Therapeutics, shedding light on new understandings of metabolic processes.

news.headline: CHEMTREC, serving 13,500+ customers globally, expands to aid U.S. chemical sector in cleanup.
news.summary: In February 24, 2025, CHEMTREC, a renowned Emergency Response Information Provider, announced an expansion of its services to enhance support for the U.S. chemical sector. With over 13,500 customers and nearly 30,000 entities globally, CHEMTREC is recognized as the primary contact for initial response in emergencies within the industry.

news.headline: Sankar Dass Navaneethan, MD, MS, MPH, won NKF's Garabed Eknoyan Award, to be presented at NKF's Spring Clinical Meetings.
news.summary: Sankar Dass Navaneethan, MD, MS, MPH, has been honored by the National Kidney Foundation (NKF) at the 2025 Spring Clinical Meetings in New York. He was awarded the prestigious Garabed Eknoyan Award in recognition of his contributions to the field. Dr. Navaneethan received the Garabed Eknoyan MD Endowed Award for his outstanding work in the field of kidney health. This recognition marks a significant achievement in his career, emphasizing his dedication and excellence.

news.headline: NANO Nuclear Energy named Two Star Partner at Operational Energy Summit, with CEO James Walker set to present.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.8% in the United States, which is a significant decrease from the previous month. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 new jobs, surpassing expectations. This boost in job creation has led to an increase in consumer confidence and spending. Analysts predict that with this positive trend, the economy is on track for continued growth in the upcoming months. The stock market also experienced a surge, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average reaching a new record high of 34,000 points. Overall, the current data indicates a promising outlook for the country's economic recovery.

news.headline: AIP Publishing and Nanjing University launch new journal MechanoEngineering on Feb. 24, 2025.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, in Melville, New York, AIP Publishing revealed a collaboration with Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics to introduce MechanoEngineering, a new journal. This partnership marks a significant step in the field of dynamic engineering.

news.headline: Alterra IOS buys 16 outdoor storage sites from TruGreen in 25-year leaseback deal, totaling 34.8 acres. TruGreen has over 2.3M customers.
news.summary: Alterra IOS, a key player in the industrial outdoor storage sector, has acquired 16 IOS locations comprising 34.8 usable acres from TruGreen, the largest lawn care service provider in the US. With over 300 sites acquired nationwide, this acquisition adds to Alterra IOS's portfolio. TruGreen currently serves approximately 2.3 million residential and commercial customers through 275+ branches across the country. The properties were obtained through a 25-year triple-net (NNN) sale-leaseback acquisition deal.

As a top luxury dealership, they are thrilled to offer this new model to customers. Meanwhile, Nvidia's stock plummeted to a crucial level on Friday. This information suggests investor activity before the upcoming release of key economic indicators.

news.summary: On February 24, 2025, in Madison, New Jersey, Century 21 Real Estate LLC revealed that the CENTURY 21® System had collected over $2.6 million throughout 2024 for Easterseals. news.summary: A prominent provider of business intelligence and market analysis, Verified Market Research®, has proudly unveiled their latest report on the Military Artificial Intelligence (AI) Market – Size and Forecast. news.headline: Zyxel Communications showcasing innovative connectivity solutions at Mobile World Congress 2025, including 5G FWA, Wi-Fi 7, Wi-Fi 6, and 10G Fi. Explore at booth 5I20 in hall 5.
news.summary: Zyxel Communications, a prominent player in secure broadband networking and connected home products, is set to present its cutting-edge broadband solutions at Mobile World Congress 2025 in Barcelona, Spain. At booth 5I20 in hall 5, attendees can explore Zyxel's pioneering offerings, such as 5G Fixed Wireless Access (FWA), Wi-Fi 7, and Wi-Fi 6 lineup, which features the award-winning Red Dot design. Visitors will also have the opportunity to try out the 10G Fi technologies. This event highlights Zyxel's commitment to revolutionizing connectivity with state-of-the-art solutions.

news.headline: Alucio™ adds new feature to capture MSL commentary at meetings and content levels. Upgrade to medical insights in Beacon platform.
news.summary: Alucio™, a rapidly expanding provider of cloud-based software serving the life sciences sector, has recently unveiled an advanced feature that now enables the capture of comments from Medical Science Liaisons (MSLs) during meetings and on content. This enhancement, launched in San Francisco on Feb. 24, 2025, significantly strengthens the platform's insights capabilities.

news.headline: Belle Haven Investments named PSN Top Guns "Manager of the Decade" 5 times for Q4 2024. Celebrated for best performing accounts.
news.summary: Belle Haven Investments, based in Rye Brook, New York, disclosed on February 24, 2025, their inclusion in the prestigious PSN Top Guns List for outstanding performance in Q4 2024. This list recognizes the top performers in separate accounts, managed accounts, and managed ETF strategies. Belle Haven Investments expressed pride in their adept navigation of the market during this period.

news.headline: Mattamy Homes opens Tyler Ranch in Phoenix's West Valley, offering brand-new single-family homes near popular destinations. Phoenix, Feb. 24, 2025.
news.summary: New single-family homes in a community just minutes from Phoenix's top attractions and amenities are now available at an exceptional value. Mattamy Homes, the largest privately owned homebuilder in North America, has recently introduced Tyler, a brand-new development located in the Phoenix area. This community offers a range of amenities and is conveniently situated near popular destinations.

news.headline: Maire, Eni, and Iren to build circular methanol and hydrogen plant in Italy with 110,000 tons/year capacity.
news.summary: NEXTCHEM has introduced its NX CircularTM technology at Eni's Sannazzaro de' Burgondi refinery, enabling the production of low-carbon circular methanol and hydrogen for eco-friendly transportation and energy purposes. The facility is slated to handle a capacity of around 110,000 tons annually.

news.headline: Robert Cartwright appointed COO of Workbox for operational leadership. EVP of the growing workspace operator.
news.summary: Robert Cartwright, an experienced industry professional, has been appointed as the Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer of Workbox, a nationwide workspace operator focused on supporting expanding businesses. The announcement was made in Chicago on February 24, 2025. Cartwright will oversee all operational activities for the company as it continues to grow and provide services to businesses across the country. Workbox aims to enhance its operations under Cartwright's leadership as they strive to meet the needs of a larger number of businesses in various industries.

news.headline: Kipu Health named one of the "Best Places to Work" in South Florida in 2025, leading provider of behavioral health tech.
news.summary: Miami-based Kipu Health, a top provider of behavioral health technology solutions, recently made its first appearance on a renowned ranking list. On February 24, 2025, the company revealed that it was named a Best Places to Work recipient in South Florida. This recognition highlights Kipu Health's commitment to creating a positive work environment for its employees.

news.headline: Incline P&C Group appoints Thomas Wafer as independent director to its insurance carriers, bringing 40+ years of experience.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on February 24, 2025, Incline P&C Group, a prominent insurance program market services company, announced the appointment of Thomas Wafer as an independent director for the Board of Directors of all its insurance carriers. With more than four decades of expertise in reinsurance, Wafer's addition brings a wealth of experience to the board.

news.headline: SoundExchange surpasses $12B in distributions to artists/owners; $1B distributed in 2024 alone.
news.summary: In February 24, 2025, SoundExchange revealed that distributions to artists and rights owners in 2024 had exceeded $1 billion. This marked a significant achievement as the company surpassed $12 billion in total distributions since its establishment in 2003. This milestone signifies the company's continued support and financial contributions to the music industry, providing valuable income to creators and copyright holders.

Global amyloidosis therapeutics market to exceed US$ 6.3B by 2035 at 8.2% CAGR, driven by rising disease prevalence and R&D investments.
news.summary: The global amyloidosis therapeutics market was valued at US$2.7 billion in 2024 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 8.2% from 2025 to 2035, ultimately reaching US$6.3 billion by 2035. The rise in prevalence of amyloidosis and investments in healthcare infrastructure are driving this growth. Amyloidosis is a rare condition characterized by abnormal protein deposition, and advancements in diagnostic tools and treatments are fueling market expansion. Key players in the market include Pfizer Inc., Johnson & Johnson, GSK plc, and Amgen Inc., who are focused on innovative drug development and market expansion through collaborations and acquisitions. Notable developments include FDA approval of Ionis and AstraZeneca's WAINUA for the treatment of hereditary transthyretin-mediated amyloidosis and advancements by Alnylam Pharmaceuticals. The market is rapidly evolving with a focus on personalized therapies and targeted treatments to improve patient outcomes.

news.headline: 2bcloud announces new leadership structure to enhance customer value, focusing on cloud investments in 2025.
news.summary: In New York on February 24, 2025, 2bcloud announced significant leadership changes aimed at enhancing customer value through cloud investments. The company's renewed focus on delivering real customer value underpins these changes, emphasizing the importance of maximizing returns for clients. This strategic realignment underscores 2bcloud's commitment to prioritizing customer needs and optimizing their cloud investments. With these key leadership alterations, 2bcloud is set to drive impactful results for its customer base, solidifying its position as a customer-centric cloud service provider.

news.headline: ohDEER expands to Midwest with first female franchisees, Jeri Lucco and Sarah, offering all-natural pest control.
news.summary: A renowned provider of all-natural pest control, ohDEER, has recently extended its services to the Midwest by introducing its initial female franchise owners in Northwest Columbus. The mother-daughter team, Jeri Lucco and Sarah, are leading this expansion. This development comes at a time when the company aims to address deer, tick, and mosquito control in the region. The move is set to bring a fresh approach to combating pests, with a focus on environmentally friendly solutions. The expansion marks a notable milestone as ohDEER continues to establish a foothold in the region.

The current price trend indicates a continuing decline for the cryptocurrency. The comparison chart illustrates the price fluctuations and volatility of Solana in the last 24 hours.
